title: MusicMoron's Create Modpack
description: A modpack for my friends, let me know what can be changed
body:
# MusicMoron's Create Modpack

This was created so my friends have an easy way to keep their mods up to date when playing on our server. _A list of mods is shown under each release as dependencies_. 

## Post-Install Additions 

In the Modrinth app, when the modpack is installed, go to the options for the modpack and scroll down to, `Unlock instance` and unlock it. It will still update the mods as I update my modpack and won't touch whatever you choose to add.

## Future Changes

- Fix shader support. Currently when Iris is added it crashes upon loading into a world.
